name: harness-mp
description: A collection of plugins that keeps Claude Code harnessed and under control

plugins.name: harness
plugins.description: Installer for harness skills and agents. Run /harness:init to install to your project.

plugins.name: harness-direct
plugins.description: Skills and agents for feature development workflows - direct install (no init command needed)

plugins.name: plugin-dev
plugins.description: Installer for plugin-dev skills and agents. Run /plugin-dev:init to install to your project.

plugins.name: plugin-dev-direct
plugins.description: Skills, agents, and commands for plugin development - direct install (no init command needed)
